config.js.description: Shared configuration — suppliers, events, Firebase, budget categories

hub.html.description: Unified shell — navigation, shared auth, module loader

venue-planner.html.description: Site layout canvas — drag/drop, Firestore save, quote summary

todo.html.description: Master to-do list — swimlane lifecycle, Firebase sync

kanban.html.description: Kanban + Gantt timeline + Build Week grid

task-tracker.html.description: Simple task tracker (legacy — superseded by todo.html)

notes:
v5-stable — pre real-world use checkpoint.
Modules: home, site planner, to-do, kanban, staff, suppliers, print.
Known issues to revisit:
- Purple Guide content needs commercial licence before redistribution (Event Safety Alliance)
- Auth needs to come back before white labelling / multi-tenant
- Architecture migration to proper SPA + module isolation needed for commercial platform
- Firestore open rules (allow read/write: if true) - temporary for development
- todo sections may need reseeding via seed-todo.html if Firestore doc has no sections field
- Magic Mouse pan not fully tested
- Mobile tap-to-place for library items not yet built
- Copy task + subtasks (artist accreditation template) not yet built
- Fencing add/delete by number not yet built
- Sub-canvas (interior of marquee/bar) not yet built
- Financials module not yet built
- White label / multi-tenant architecture not yet built
